case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS SANCCHEZ MARGARITA AKA ALVARADO MARGARITA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,217.80 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCCHEZ MARGARITA AKA ALVARADO MARGARITA ALVARADO ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALVARADO ALEX

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCCHEZ MARGARITA AKA ALVARADO MARGARITA ALVARADO ALEX $3,217.80 PRINCIPAL, $38.83 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,256.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
